# Spotify Ads Analytics Guide for Marketers (2026) - Improvado

## Summary
Improvado's comprehensive Spotify Ads analytics guide covers measurement setup, platform-specific benchmarks for audio and video ad formats, and optimization signals. The most authoritative compilation of 2026 Spotify benchmark data found in research.

## Key quotations / statistics
- "Audio ads on Spotify Free consistently achieve 95%+ completion because users can't skip."
- "Video ads average 40-60% completion."

### Benchmark table (2026)
| Metric | Audio Ads | Video Ads |
|---|---|---|
| Completion Rate | 95%+ | 40-60% |
| Click-Through Rate | 0.3-0.8% | 1.2-2.5% |
| Cost per Completed Listen | $0.015-$0.035 | N/A |
| View-Through Conversion Rate | 0.5-1.5% | 0.8-2.0% |
| Brand Lift (Ad Recall) | +8 to +12 points | +10 to +15 points |

- "Industry benchmarks for Spotify audio CTR range from 0.3% to 0.8%"
- "Spotify Brand Lift measures ad recall, brand awareness, message association, favorability, and purchase intent. Spotify reports average lifts of +10 points for ad recall, +5 points for brand awareness, and +4 points for message association."
- "If your audio completion rate is below 90%, check ad placement settings."
- "If your CTR is below 0.3%, your companion card creative or CTA isn't compelling."
- **Focus metrics:** reach (unique listeners), completion rate, CTR, cost per completed listen (CPCL), conversion rate by attribution window (1-day post-click, 7-day post-click, 7-day post-impression), brand lift scores

## Broader Spotify statistics (from amraandelma.com 2026 compilation)
- Ad-supported tier: ~58% of 706M MAUs (Q1 2026)
- Podcast advertising revenue: >€600M projected 2026
- Programmatic audio: 44% of all Spotify ad transactions (IAB March 2026)
- Mobile app conversion benchmark: 1.34% globally (AppsFlyer Q1 2026)
- Podcast listener conversion rate: ~23% among engaged listeners (Nielsen Audio Feb 2026)
- "1 in 5 podcast listeners who engage with an advertiser end up converting" (Spotify Ad Analytics Q3 2023)
- Ad engagement transfer rate: 95% (Spotify Brand Impact Q1 2026)

## Annotations for stinger-forge
- **Primary source for `guides/10-podcast-advertising.md`** Spotify section
- The 95%+ audio completion rate (unskippable) is the defining feature of Spotify audio vs all other platforms - should be highlighted prominently
- The 23% podcast listener conversion rate among engaged listeners is a strong ROI argument for podcast advertising
- The companion display card (with CTR 0.3-0.8%) is an important format detail that many guides overlook
- Brand Lift measurement (available in 14 markets) should be mentioned in `guides/10-podcast-advertising.md` as the measurement approach for upper-funnel podcast campaigns
